EarthObservationJobSummaries.description: Contains summary information about the Earth Observation jobs.

NextToken.description: If the previous response was truncated, you receive this token. Use it in your next request to receive the next set of results.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the list of the Earth Observation jobs.

DurationInSeconds.description: The duration of the session, in seconds.

Name.description: The names of the Earth Observation jobs in the list.

OperationType.description: The operation type for an Earth Observation job.

Status.description: The status of the list of the Earth Observation jobs.

Tags.description: Each tag consists of a key and a value.

NextToken.description: If the previous response was truncated, you receive this token. Use it in your next request to receive the next set of results.

ErrorType.description: The type of error generated during the Vector Enrichment job.

Tags.description: Each tag consists of a key and a value.

ApproximateResultCount.description: Approximate number of results in the response.

Items.description: List of items matching the Raster DataCollectionQuery.

NextToken.description: If the previous response was truncated, you receive this token. Use it in your next request to receive the next set of results.

Assets.description: This is a dictionary of Asset Objects data associated with the Item that can be downloaded or streamed, each with a unique key.

DateTime.description: The searchable date and time of the item, in UTC.

Type.description: GeoJson Geometry types like Polygon and MultiPolygon.

Id.description: A unique Id for the source item.

Properties.description: This field contains additional properties of the item.

LandsatCloudCoverLand.description: Land cloud cover for Landsat Data Collection.

Platform.description: Platform property. Platform refers to the unique name of the specific platform the instrument is attached to. For satellites it is the name of the satellite, eg. landsat-8 (Landsat-8), sentinel-2a.

ViewOffNadir.description: The angle from the sensor between nadir (straight down) and the scene center. Measured in degrees (0-90).

ViewSunAzimuth.description: The sun azimuth angle. From the scene center point on the ground, this is the angle between truth north and the sun. Measured clockwise in degrees (0-360).

ViewSunElevation.description: The sun elevation angle. The angle from the tangent of the scene center point to the sun. Measured from the horizon in degrees (-90-90). Negative values indicate the sun is below the horizon, e.g. sun elevation of -10° means the data was captured during nautical twilight.

RasterDataCollectionQuery.description: The structure representing the RasterDataCollection Query consisting of the Area of Interest, RasterDataCollectionArn, RasterDataCollectionName, TimeRange, and Property Filters.

AreaOfInterest.description: The Area of Interest used in the search.

AreaOfInterestGeometry.description: A GeoJSON object representing the geographic extent in the coordinate space.

LogicalOperator.description: The Logical Operator used to combine the Property Filters.

RasterDataCollectionArn.description: The ARN of the Raster Data Collection against which the search is done.

RasterDataCollectionName.description: The name of the raster data collection.

TimeRangeFilter.description: The TimeRange filter used in the search.

EndTime.description: The ending time for the time range filter.

StartTime.description: The starting time for the time range filter.
